name: Urolithin A frail older adult mitochondrial-quality registry study
summary: Completed randomized quadruple-masked frail-older-adult study of Mitopure urolithin A versus placebo, with mitochondrial area and cristae density as primary muscle endpoints and no posted results in the 2026-06-10 ClinicalTrials.gov API view.
population: 26 frail adults aged 65 to 85 years randomized to Mitopure urolithin A or placebo

trial_details.expected_results_window: Completed Apr. 25, 2025; no posted results were present in the Jun. 10, 2026 ClinicalTrials.gov API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Worth watching because the study is complete, but the registry still has no posted results.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether urolithin A changes mitochondrial muscle structure and related functional or safety endpoints in frail older adults, but the primary endpoints are still biomarker and mechanistic.
